name: Mango Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the diced mango and diced cantaloupe.
2. Add the chopped green chiles to the mixture.
3. Stir in the thinly sliced scallion and chopped cilantro.
4. Drizzle with fresh lime juice and sprinkle with ground red pepper.
5. Mix all ingredients thoroughly until combined.
6. Serve immediately or refrigerate for up to 3 days.
